risks.risk: Offline sync complexity — conflict resolution when data changes on device and server simultaneously
risks.mitigation: Implement last-write-wins with server timestamp, add manual conflict resolution UI for critical data

risks.risk: Real-time order updates may lag on slow connections
risks.mitigation: Use WebSocket with fallback to polling, optimistic UI updates

risks.risk: Cross-platform UI inconsistencies between iOS and Android
risks.mitigation: Follow Material 3 design, test on both platforms, use platform-specific adapters where needed

recommendation: Proceed with development. Offline sync is the highest-risk item — allocate dedicated sprint for sync layer.
